enableLLM.description: Enable LLM-based claim extraction when regex confidence is low

extractionThreshold.description: Minimum confidence for regex extraction before falling back to LLM

verificationThreshold.description: Minimum confidence to mark claim as verified

trustWarningThreshold.description: Trust score below which to show warning

trustBlockThreshold.description: Trust score below which to block actions

autoVerify.description: Automatically verify claims after each response
